        <script>
            function fnLogout() {

                fireUnloadEvent = false;
                document.LogoutForm.randomRequestTrnNumber.value = document.getElementById("randomReqTrnNumberFromCommon").value;
                document.LogoutForm.action = "j_spring_security_logout";
                document.LogoutForm.submit();
                return;
            }

            function fnDoYouWantToGiveFeedback() {

                $("#feedbackPopup").modal("show");

            }

            function openFeedbackPage() {
                $("#feedbackPopup").modal("hide");
                updateContainer('web?requestType=ApplicationRH&actionFlag=loadCmnFeedbackDtls&logoutOnSubmit=true', '', 'pageContent', '');
            }

            function fnViewMedicalUserProfile() {
                updateContainer('web?requestType=ApplicationRH&actionFlag=getMedicalUserProfilePage', '', 'pageContent', '');

            }

            function fnViewAMEUserProfile() {
                updateContainer('web?requestType=ApplicationRH&actionFlag=getAMEProfilePage&viewPageOnly=1', '', 'pageContent', '');
            }

            function fnViewOperatorRoleProfile() {
                updateContainer('web?requestType=ApplicationRH&actionFlag=getOperatorProfilePage&viewPageOnly=1', '', 'pageContent', '');
            }

            function fnViewFcaItpRoleProfile() {
                updateContainer('web?requestType=ApplicationRH&actionFlag=getFcaItpProfilePage&viewPageOnly=1', '', 'pageContent', '');
            }

            function fnViewDroneUsersProfile() {
                updateContainer('web?requestType=ApplicationRH&actionFlag=getDroneUserProfilePage&viewPageOnly=1', '', 'pageContent', '');
            }
            function fnViewCabinCrewMemberProfile() {

                updateContainer('web?requestType=ApplicationRH&actionFlag=viewCabinCrewMemberProfile', '', 'pageContent', '');
            }
            function fnViewFlightDispatcherUserProfile() {
                updateContainer('web?requestType=ApplicationRH&actionFlag=getFlightDispatcherUserProfilePage', '', 'pageContent', '');
            }
            //Added by Janki
            function loadFtoPilotDtlsForEfar() {
                var token = '5c64f24c-d29d-4695-b651-2107343ed2b4';
                var urlStyle = 'width=1000,height=500,toolbar=no,menubar=no,location=no,top=50,left=100';
                var url = "web?requestType=ApplicationRH&actionVal=loadFtoPilotDtlsForEfar&screenId=4000001&_csrf=" + token;
                window.open(url, 'test', urlStyle);
                hideProgressbar();
            }

            function fnViewAllRole() {
                $("#roleNamePopup").modal("show");
            }
        </script>

        <script>

            function getMeName(menuname) {
                if (menuname != null) {
                    document.getElementById('menumname').innerHTML = menuname;

                }
                $(document).ready(function () {
                    //home
                    $('#200925').click(function () {
                        $('main-sidebar').removeClass('col-md-3')
                        $('content-wrapper').removeClass('col-md-3')
                    })
                    //apply
                    $('#200939').click(function () {
                        $('main-sidebar').addClass('col-md-3')
                        $('content-wrapper').addClass('col-md-9')
                    })

                });
        </script>

<script type="text/javascript">
        function Home() {
            $('div ul li a').parent().siblings().removeClass('active');
            loadMiddlePage('200925', 'web?requestType=ApplicationRH&actionVal=Temp&screenId=114&menuCode=200925&auditUSFlag=true');
        }

        function fnLogout() {

            fireUnloadEvent = false;
            document.LogoutForm.randomRequestTrnNumber.value = document.getElementById("randomReqTrnNumberFromCommon").value;
            document.LogoutForm.action = "j_spring_security_logout";
            document.LogoutForm.submit();
            return;
        }
        var fireUnloadEvent = true;
        function hideshow() {
            if (fireUnloadEvent) {
                document.LogoutForm.action = "j_spring_security_logout";
                document.LogoutForm.method = "post";
                document.LogoutForm.submit();
            }
        }

        if (navigator.appName == "Microsoft Internet Explorer") {
            window.onunload = hideshow;//for IE and Chrome
        }
        else {
            window.onbeforeunload = hideshow; //for Mozilla
        }



        function loadMiddlePage(prntMenuId, dataFrameURL) {
            showProgressbar();
            $(".postLoginMenu").show();
            if (prntMenuId != '-1') {
                menuAct('web?requestType=ApplicationRH&actionVal=menuList&screenId=114&PRNT_MENU_ID=' + prntMenuId, 'contLeftcolumn');
            }
            else {
                treeMenuDisplay('NO');
            }

            var mainMenuRedirectURL = false;
            var isParentMenu = "40000,50000,40001".includes(prntMenuId);
            if (isParentMenu && !mainMenuRedirectURL) {
                menuAct(dataFrameURL, 'pageContent');
                hideProgressbar();
            }


            menuAct(dataFrameURL, 'pageContent');
            hideProgressbar();

        }




        treeMenuDisplay('NO');
        loadMiddlePage('200925', 'web?requestType=ApplicationRH&actionVal=Temp&screenId=114&menuCode=200925&auditUSFlag=true');

        var lStrThmTitle = '';
        var myForm = document.LogoutForm;
        //store a reference to the native submit method...
        myForm.nativeSubmit = myForm.submit;
        //override the submit method, to your needs...
        myForm.submit = function () {
            document.LogoutForm.randomRequestTrnNumber.value = document
                .getElementById("randomReqTrnNumberFromCommon").value;
            //call the native submit...
            this.nativeSubmit();
        }

        $(document).ready(function () {
            // hide back-top first
            $(".pright").hide();

            // fade in back-top
            $(function () {
                $(window).scroll(function () {
                    if ($(this).scrollTop() > 500) {
                        $('a.pright').fadeIn();
                    } else {
                        $('a.pright').fadeOut();
                    }
                });

                // scroll body to 0px on click
                $('a.pright').click(function () {
                    $('body,html').animate({
                        scrollTop: 0
                    }, 500);
                    return false;
                });
            });

            // anchor bind event
            $(document).on("click", "a", function (event) {
                url = $(this).attr('href');
                if (url != null) {
                    target = $(this).attr('target');
                    if (target != null) {
                        if (target == '_blank') {
                            window.open(url, target);
                        }
                        else if (target == 'download') {
                            var link = $(this).attr("href");
                            iframe = document.createElement('iframe');
                            iframe.id = 'download_iframe';
                            iframe.style.display = 'none';
                            this.parentNode.appendChild(iframe);
                            iframe.src = link;
                            iframe.onload = setTimeout(function () {
                                iframe.parentNode.removeChild(iframe);
                            }, 250);
                        }
                    }
                    else {
                        if (url.startsWith('#')) {
                            window.location.href = url;
                        }
                        else if (url.startsWith('javascript')) {
                            return;
                        }
                        else if (url.startsWith('http')) {
                            window.location = url;
                        }
                        else {
                            updateContainer(url);
                        }
                    }
                }
                event.preventDefault();
                event.stopPropagation();
            });
        });

</script>

</html>
